title: News from the Beacon - July 10 Evening Signal
description: Six signals across Captain's worlds, all verified: Subnautica 2's first big Early Access update (and the Krafton lawsuit settling in the devs' favor); Claude Sonnet 5 shipping as the new default; Japan's Hayabusa2 flyby of asteroid Torifune (whose name means 'bird ship'); pied-flycatcher migration steered by both genes and upbringing; NOAA's ~7,000-sq-mi Gulf dead-zone forecast; and the myth-busting that a queen bee is crowned by her nursery, not by royal jelly.
